name: W. Kamau Bell
bio: W. Kamau Bell is an American stand-up comedian and television host whose sociopolitical comedy focuses on race, identity, and American politics. He hosted the FX/FXX series Totally Biased with W. Kamau Bell and the CNN docuseries United Shades of America, and directed the documentary We Need to Talk About Cosby. His stand-up work includes the special Semi-Prominent Negro and the Netflix special Private School Negro.

timeline.ev: Debuts the one-man show The W. Kamau Bell Curve
Totally Biased with W. Kamau Bell premieres on FX
United Shades of America premieres on CNN
Netflix special Private School Negro released
Directs the docuseries We Need to Talk About Cosby

accolades: Multiple Emmy wins as producer of United Shades of America
Peabody Award for We Need to Talk About Cosby
Named San Franciscos best comedian by multiple local outlets in 2012

movies_tv.t: We Need to Talk About Cosby
